# IEI Kanyakumari Local Centre

> Official website of The Institution of Engineers (India), Kanyakumari Local Centre (KKLC). A professional engineering body serving engineers, academicians, and students in Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu, India.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.ieikanyakumarilc.org/)
- [Office Bearers](https://www.ieikanyakumarilc.org/members)
- [Events & Technical Activities](https://www.ieikanyakumarilc.org/technical-activities)
- [Gallery](https://www.ieikanyakumarilc.org/gallery)
- [Conferences](https://www.ieikanyakumarilc.org/conferences)
- [Newsletter](https://www.ieikanyakumarilc.org/newsletter)
- [Facilities](https://www.ieikanyakumarilc.org/facilities)
- [Resources & Downloads](https://www.ieikanyakumarilc.org/links-downloads)
- [Contact](https://www.ieikanyakumarilc.org/contact)

## About

The Institution of Engineers (India), Kanyakumari Local Centre (KKLC) was established in 2015 and is affiliated with the national body IEI, founded in 1920. The centre serves professional engineers across Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu.

## Contact

- Email: [ieikanyakumarilc@gmail.com](mailto:ieikanyakumarilc@gmail.com)
- Phone: [+91-9443993659](tel:+919443993659)
- Address: Nagercoil, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu, India
- Membership Portal: [ieindia.org](https://www.ieindia.org/web/home)

## Optional

Full content is available at the URLs listed above. This site does not require authentication for public pages.
